note: Independent third-party TMM. Same complex-index convention as TFStudio (n+ik, k>0). Inputs are byte-identical to the JS side; only the math is tested.

cases.name: MgF2 QW AR / glass
cases.desc: Single quarter-wave MgF2 on glass, normal incidence (classic AR).

cases.name: (H L)^8 H dielectric mirror / glass
cases.desc: 17-layer quarter-wave TiO2/SiO2 high reflector, normal incidence.

cases.name: 5-layer dielectric @45°
cases.desc: Non-QW 5-layer TiO2/SiO2 stack, oblique 45°, s and p, plus ellipsometry.

cases.name: a-Si 200nm / glass (absorbing)
cases.desc: Weakly absorbing 200 nm a-Si on glass; normal and 60° s/p — R+T+A=1.

cases.name: Ag 25nm / glass (metal film)
cases.desc: Semi-transparent 25 nm silver on glass; R/T/A + ellipsometry 65/70/75°.

cases.name: Bare Cr substrate (ellipsometry)
cases.desc: Bare chromium; ellipsometric Psi/Delta at 55/65/75° — single interface.

cases.name: Spacer-on-mirror (phase/GD)
cases.desc: SiO2 spacer over a QW mirror @800nm — strong reflected-phase dispersion.
